curation_notes: Re-curated with updated hints. Patch from PR #18368 (merged as 142d319f0a). Only one non-test source file changed: KerberosAuthenticator.java. The vulnerability is in init() where ThreadLocalRandom (non-crypto PRNG) was used as a fallback for the cookie signature secret, and in getInitParameters() where the secret was only conditionally passed. Vulnerability class crypto-weakness confirmed from CWE-338 (Use of Cryptographically Weak PRNG) — the patch removes ThreadLocalRandom and makes the secret configuration mandatory. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern.
